series_metadata.series_description: Includes routine internal correspondence (emails, letters, memos), as well as correspondence from and responses to various individuals, companies, and organizations requesting information pertaining to agency and legal interpretations and other miscellaneous inquiries. General correspondence is informative (it does not attempt to influence agency policy.)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: period specified electronic format ; Electronic: six (6) months LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject a litigation hold must be retained hold is lifted by Legal Office, regardless of whether specified retention period has elapsed
